description_long: This object is a tall, multi-stemmed cactus planted in a rectangular, modern-style pot filled with small, light-colored gravel. The cactus features several upright, ribbed green columns with subtle vertical striping and occasional branching, typical of columnar cacti such as the Mexican Fence Post or Pachycereus marginatus. The pot is a simple, unadorned rectangular prism with a smooth, matte gray finish, providing a contemporary look suitable for urban environments. The gravel top layer covers the soil, enhancing the aesthetic and helping with drainage. The cactus appears healthy, with no visible flowers or fruit, and the overall arrangement is clean and minimalistic. This potted plant would be well-suited for placement in public plazas, sidewalks, or modern building entrances.
description: A tall, multi-stemmed columnar cactus in a plain rectangular gray pot filled with light gravel, exuding a modern, minimalistic urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the clustered arrangement of upright cactus stems and the rectangular pot with gravel surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the verticality of the cactus stems and the depth of the rectangular pot.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tallest cactus stems and the even distribution of gravel in the pot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the ribbed texture of the cactus and the clean lines of the pot.
attribute_plant_species: columnar cactus (likely Pachycereus marginatus or similar)
